flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at South Piedmont Community College fell 34% between 2006 and 2009 (30.3% → 20.1%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at South Piedmont Community College rose 25% between 1997 and 1999 ($2.0k → $2.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at South Piedmont Community College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (63.6% → 57.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at South Piedmont Community College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.8k).
